name: agentdemo
description: Create Storylane-style interactive demos for Microsoft Copilot Studio agents published to M365 Copilot

tools.name: create_demo
tools.description: Create a new interactive demo from Copilot Studio + M365 Copilot URLs

tools.name: get_demo_status
tools.description: Get status and output path for a demo by slug

tools.name: resume_demo
tools.description: Resume an interrupted demo capture session

tools.name: list_demos
tools.description: List all demos with their status

tools.name: generate_demo_html
tools.description: Regenerate demo HTML from existing captured screenshots
